Module 2: The Business
Launch Formula, Part 4
!
Executive Summary
!
One more Business Launch Formula Example: My Current
PLF Business
Common themes: Start the list, build the list, build a portfolio of products
over time. It’s all about starting small and building over time.
In 2003 I went to a marketing seminar, and had been selling online for
seven years. I found an interest in teaching marketing and thought about
teaching this to others, so I began building relationships with people in this
industry.
I went home, put up a squeeze page, and started doing list building in this
market. I began by publishing content casually and promoting affiliate
products just 1-2 times a year. I had a website and squeeze page:
SixInSeven.com. I also created some autoresponder copy.
In March 2005 the partnership on the stock business suddenly went away. I
was scheduled to speak at Yanik Silver’s Underground seminar - about
200-300 people in the room. I took this as an opportunity to put a training
together on product launches and sell it from the stage.
!
1	© 2014 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
GROUPINSIDERS.COM EXCLUSIVE

-- 1 of 3 --

I ended up speaking for 1 hour and 25 minutes and gave great content -
this resulted in a $3,000 offer, which I sold to 6 people = $18,000.
This became the initial “seed launch” for Product Launch Formula. This
was great because the business had gone away, but the results were from
this were lousy in general.
I took these 6 people and invited them into a mastermind group on a
comped basis. In the end I had 36 people in this first training.
Next, I delivered a training series - 5 teleseminars. Throughout the process
I continued going back to the group and saying, “What questions do you
have? What didn’t I cover? What do I need to do differently?”
• 	This led to learning how to teach product launches
• 	I got great case studies from this and began to fine-tune the product
• 	From there I created version 1.0 of Product Launch Formula
• 	At the time I had about 2,000 people on a small list, but also had many
JV partners through building friendships during the last two years
• 	So my JV’s sent their people into the prelaunch - resulted in 15-20,000
people on the new list
• 	This new launch did $600,000 - it was the biggest launch at this time and
no one knew who I was
• 	It was successful because the initial workshop had been done and I
learned how to really teach the concepts
!
2	© 2014 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
GROUPINSIDERS.COM EXCLUSIVE

-- 2 of 3 --

• 	We kept the product in the market and did about $1 million in sales per
year
• 	In 2008 I came out with PLF 2.0 - I leveraged all the JV’s and list building
I had done - this resulted in $3.7 million in 36 hours!
• 	We added a coaching program and live event to the offer - earned this
based off the positioning earned from the 1.0 launch.
• 	A few years later we came out with 3.0 version - again around $3.6
million in sales. Out of this launch came a Platinum mastermind group
• 	Next, Product Launch Manager was born - new product that the market
said they wanted - $2.5 million in sales - a $10,000 workshop
All of this resulted from doing an initial seed launch that started with 6
people. Now over 10,000 people have gone through PLF.
How? listening to what the market wants, updating/upgrading the product,
and creating additional products.
It can start very humbly. It’s all about getting that first product out there.
!
